title: Cannot mutably borrow in a match guard
explanation: This error occurs when you try to mutably borrow a value inside a match guard (the `if` condition in a match arm). Match guards must not mutate the value being matched, as this could invalidate the match.
error_message: error[E0301]: cannot mutably borrow in a pattern guard

fixes.description: Move the mutation outside the match
Use only immutable operations in the guard

tip: Match guards should be pure conditions. Do any mutations before or after the match expression, not inside guards.
